给你一个长度为 `n` 的整数数组 `nums`。

你从下标 0 开始，目标是到达下标 `n - 1`。

在任何下标 `i` 处，你可以执行以下操作之一：

- **移动到相邻格子**：跳到下标 `i + 1` 或 `i - 1`，如果该下标在边界内。
- **质数传送**：如果 `nums[i]` 是一个**质数** `p`，你可以立即跳到任何满足 `nums[j] % p == 0` 的下标 `j` 处，且下标 `j != i` 。

返回到达下标 `n - 1` 所需的 **最少** 跳跃次数。

**质数** 是一个大于 1 的自然数，只有两个因子，1 和它本身。

 

**示例 1:**

**输入:** nums = [1,2,4,6]

**输出:** 2

**解释:**

一个最优的跳跃序列是：

- 从下标 `i = 0` 开始。向相邻下标 1 跳一步。
- 在下标 `i = 1`，`nums[1] = 2` 是一个质数。因此，我们传送到索引 `i = 3`，因为 `nums[3] = 6` 可以被 2 整除。

因此，答案是 2。

def solve(nums)
  n = nums.length
  max_spf = 1_000_000
  spf = Array.new(max_spf + 1, 0)
  (2..max_spf).each do |i|
    if spf[i] == 0
      spf[i] = i
      (i*2..max_spf).step(i) do |j|
        if spf[j] == 0
          spf[j] = i
        end
      end
    end
  end

  prime_to_indices = Hash.new { |h, k| h[k] = [] }

  nums.each_with_index do |x, j|
    if x == 1
      next
    end
    temp = x
    primes = Set.new
    while temp > 1
      p = spf[temp]
      primes << p
      while temp % p == 0
        temp /= p
      end
    end
    primes.each do |p|
      prime_to_indices[p] << j
    end
  end

  visited = Array.new(n, -1)
  queue = [0]
  visited[0] = 0

  while queue.any?
    i = queue.shift
    current_steps = visited[i]

    [i-1, i+1].each do |next_i|
      if next_i >= 0 && next_i < n && visited[next_i] == -1
        visited[next_i] = current_steps + 1
        queue << next_i
      end
    end

    if nums[i] >= 2 && spf[nums[i]] == nums[i]
      p = nums[i]
      indices = prime_to_indices[p]
      indices.each do |j|
        if j != i && visited[j] == -1
          visited[j] = current_steps + 1
          queue << j
        end
      end
    end
  end

  visited[-1]
end

                if (spf[j] == 0L) {

                }
            }
        }

    val primeToIndices = HashMap<Long, MutableList<Int>>()
    for (j in 0 until n) {
        val x = nums[j]

        val primes = HashSet<Long>()

            while (temp % p == 0) {
                temp /= p
            }
        }
        for (p in primes) {
            primeToIndices.getOrPut(p) { mutableListOf() }.add(j)
        }
    }

    val visited = IntArray(n) { -1 }
    val queue = LinkedList<Int>()
    queue.add(0)
    visited[0] = 0

    while (queue.isNotEmpty()) {
        val i = queue.poll()
        val currentSteps = visited[i]

        // Check adjacent indices
        for (nextI in listOf(i - 1, i + 1)) {
            if (nextI in 0 until n && visited[nextI] == -1) {

                queue.add(nextI)

                    visited[j] = currentSteps + 1
                    queue.add(j)
                }
            }
        }
    }

    return visited[n - 1].toLong()
}

  n = nums.length

  spf = Array.new(max_spf + 1, 0)
  (2..max_spf).each do |i|
    if spf[i] == 0
      spf[i] = i
      (i*2..max_spf).step(i) do |j|
        if spf[j] == 0
          spf[j] = i
        end
      end
    end
  end

  prime_to_indices = Hash.new { |h, k| h[k] = [] }

  nums.each_with_index do |x, j|
    if x == 1
      next
    end
    temp = x
    primes = Set.new
    while temp > 1
      p = spf[temp]
      primes << p
      while temp % p == 0
        temp /= p
      end
    end
    primes.each do |p|
      prime_to_indices[p] << j
    end
  end

  visited = Array.new(n, -1)

        end

    end
  end

end

def solve(nums)
  n = nums.length
  max_spf = 1_000_000
  spf = Array.new(max_spf + 1, 0)
  (2..max_spf).each do |i|
    if spf[i] == 0
      spf[i] = i
      (i*2..max_spf).step(i) do |j|
        if spf[j] == 0
          spf[j] = i
        end
      end
    end
  end

  prime_to_indices = Hash.new { |h, k| h[k] = [] }

  nums.each_with_index do |x, j|
    if x == 1
      next
    end
    temp = x
    primes = Set.new
    while temp > 1
      p = spf[temp]
      primes << p
      while temp % p == 0
        temp /= p
      end
    end
    primes.each do |p|
      prime_to_indices[p] << j
    end
  end

  visited = Array.new(n, -1)
  queue = [0]
  visited[0] = 0

  while queue.any?
    i = queue.shift
    current_steps = visited[i]

    [i-1, i+1].each do |next_i|
      if next_i >= 0 && next_i < n && visited[next_i] == -1
        visited[next_i] = current_steps + 1
        queue << next_i
      end

      indices = prime_to_indices[p]
      indices.each do |j|
        if j != i && visited[j] == -1
          visited[j] = current_steps + 1
          queue << j
        end
      end
    end
  end

  visited[-1]
end
